channel.title: Code4it.dev on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Code4it.dev on .NET Ramblings

item.title: No more regressions with Snapshot Tests in C# using Verify: a practical guide
item.description: Snapshot Tests are an uncommon type of test that focuses on checking that no regressions were introduced after a code refactoring. Let’s learn how they work and how to use the Verify NuGet library to add them to your test suite. Link to article: https://www.code4it.dev/blog/snapshot-tests-with-verify/
